def process_file(path):
    # Violation: deeply nested try-except beyond two levels
    try:
        with open(path) as f:
            try:
                data = f.read()
                try:
                    return parse(data)
                except ParseError:
                    print("Parse fail")
            except OSError:
                print("Read fail")
    except FileNotFoundError:
        print("Missing file")
